## Implementation

- [ ] Smallest coherent vertical slice
- [ ] Exact changed files inspected
- [ ] No unrelated rewrite or dependency upgrade
- [ ] Safety and privacy boundaries preserved

## Proof

- [ ] Ruff
- [ ] Ruff format check
- [ ] Strict mypy
- [ ] Backend tests
- [ ] Frontend lint, tests and build when applicable
- [ ] Artifacts or screenshots inspected when applicable
- [ ] Real target environment checked when applicable
